title: Mission: Impossible
desc: Ethan Hunt, an elite intelligence agent, is branded a traitor following a disastrous mission in Prague. He recruits a team of operatives to help him retrieve a computer disk that can clear his name.

title: The Amazing Spider-Man
desc: After a genetically altered spider bites him, Peter Parker develops superhuman abilities and confronts a humanoid reptilian creature.

title: Kong: Skull Island
desc: A crew that reaches Skull Island to map it, is attacked by a humongous ape. The survivors then regroup to find out more about the ape, the island's natives and underground monsters.

title: Rush Hour 2
desc: Detective James Carter and Chief Inspector Lee return to action after a bomb explosion at the US Embassy in Hong Kong.

title: Dora and the Lost City of Gold
desc: While searching for a hidden land, the parents of a teenage Dora go missing. Consequently, she and her new high-school friends go in search of the lost city of gold with hopes of finding her parents.

title: Transformers
desc: When Sam Witwicky buys a car, he unwittingly involves himself in a clash between Autobots and Decepticons over a device that can create life.

title: Superfast!
desc: Undercover agent Lucas White endeavours to join Vin Serento's gang of street racers. Together, they plan to steal a large amount of money from crime kingpin Juan Carlos.

title: Fallen
desc: Detective John Hobbes witnesses the execution of a demonic serial killer, Edgar Reese. However, questions arise when the murders start again, eerily matching the modus operandi of Reese.

title: Sonakshi Sinha; The Love Laugh Live Show
desc: The host invites prominent personalities and engages them in candid conversations about their personal and professional lives.

title: Sinister 2
desc: Courtney Collins, a single mother, relocates to a rural home with her twin sons. Later, she discovers it's inhabited by malevolent spirits connected to the sinister entity Bughuul.

title: The November Man
desc: Peter, a former CIA officer, is assigned the task of protecting a valuable witness, Alice, who has secret information about a Russian presidential candidate.

title: Sherlock Holmes
desc: Sherlock Holmes and Dr Watson send Lord Henry Blackwood, a serial killer, to the gallows. However, they are shocked to learn that he is back from the dead and pursue him again.

title: Constantine
desc: Detective Angela approaches Constantine, an exorcist, to help her investigate her twin sister's death. As he digs deeper, he realises a dark conspiracy which could threaten the world.

title: Mission: Impossible II
desc: Agent Ethan Hunt fights against a rogue terrorist and rushes to prevent a deadly virus from spreading. To avert a global catastrophe, Ethan has to bring everything to an end.

title: Transformers
desc: When Sam Witwicky buys a car, he unwittingly involves himself in a clash between Autobots and Decepticons over a device that can create life.

title: Spider-Man
desc: Peter Parker's life changes when he is bitten by a genetically altered spider and gains superpowers. He uses his powers to help people and finds himself facing the Green Goblin, an evil maniac.

title: Justice League
desc: Steppenwolf and his Parademons return after aeons to destroy Earth. However, Batman seeks the help of Wonder Woman to recruit The Flash, Cyborg and Aquaman to fight their new powerful enemy.

title: The Lost City
desc: Loretta Sage, a novelist, faces real-life peril when abducted by a billionaire.

title: A Quiet Place Part II
desc: In a post-apocalyptic world, Regan and her family learn that the alien predators can be defeated using high-frequency audio. Soon, armed with this knowledge, they set out to look for other survivors.

title: Top Gun: Maverick
desc: After 30 years of service, Maverick mentors a troop of elite Top Gun alumni for an esteemed mission while battling his demons from the past.
